svg.title: CloudStart GmbH Azure architecture
svg.desc: A resource group named rg-cloudstart contains a virtual network with two subnets (snet-app and snet-mgmt), each with their own NSG and VM, plus supporting services: Blob Storage, Monitor, Defender for Cloud, and App Service. Microsoft Entra ID sits outside the resource group, linked via RBAC. An admin connects in via RDP and SSH.
